{{youtube channel}}
[[File:Immanuelle alter.png|thumb]]
Old avatar<ref>https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/103934035</ref>

== Videos containing Immanuelle alter ==
[https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLM3v2nl0P_5KSlb46tBjlFGt8ldIzr4cY Playlist here]<ref>https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLM3v2nl0P_5KSlb46tBjlFGt8ldIzr4cY</ref>

==Creator==
Ths creator is [https://twitter.com/0x4682B4 0x4682B4] and he seems to have had drama related to it. I might make a video on it. [[Immanuelle alter video]].
==Blurb on videos==
vtuber model in this video is Mk1
This is the creator's twitter https://twitter.com/0x4682B4
This is their website https://0x4682b4.carrd.co/
See this playlist for all videos with her
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLM3v2nl0P_5KSlb46tBjlFGt8ldIzr4cY
See this article for the lore around her
https://lifeism.miraheze.org/wiki/Immanuelle_alter

==References==

[[Category:Immanuelle alter]]
[[Category:Lore]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
